query: SELECT c.id, c.status, c.contactName, c.contactPhone, c.duration, c.callDate, c.source, c.teamMemberId, c.recordingUrl, c.transcriptText, c.createdAt, c.failedReason, tm.name as teamMemberName FROM calls c LEFT JOIN team_members tm ON c.teamMemberId = tm.id WHERE c.status = 'queued' ORDER BY c.createdAt DESC
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bTLYzeacnuAd6z.root --database nusXfQu5XBTMz3NUCR6brb --execute SELECT c.id, c.status, c.contactName, c.contactPhone, c.duration, c.callDate, c.source, c.teamMemberId, c.recordingUrl, c.transcriptText, c.createdAt, c.failedReason, tm.name as teamMemberName FROM calls c LEFT JOIN team_members tm ON c.teamMemberId = tm.id WHERE c.status = 'queued' ORDER BY c.createdAt DESC
